case_title: TENDERLOIN HEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION VS. STEVEN JANACEK et al

MASTER CALENDAR JURY

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-22-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Jason Jungreis, Clerk: Felicia Green, Not Reported. (Dept. 218)

Appearances:
Billy Martin, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff Tenderloin Neighborhood Development Corporation.
Attorney, Michael Sherwood Rossoff representing the plaintiff.

Defendant, Steven Janacek is present.
Attorneys, Aaron Morrison and Paul Behrend representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case did not settle, the trial date remains set.
